titleStmt.title: SII 37.427: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 427. (A.R. No. E 20 of 1941-42.) Uḷchāla, Kurnool Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated in Śaka 1477, Ānanda, Phālguṇa, śu. 15, corresponding to 1555 A.D., March 8, Friday.

It registers the gift of the Virpravinōdivartana for the worship of Āñjanēya at Vuḷuchala by the Vipravinōdin Mantramūrti Pedda Basuvaya, son of Gangādhara Voḍeyala Piṇavīramrāju of the Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajuś-śakha for the merit of the several members of his community.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1477 Agunēṭi Ānaṁ
da saṁvatsara phālguṇa śu 15 lu . śrīmadrājādhi
rājarājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī vīrasadāśivadēva ma
hārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvī
sāmrājyaṁ śēstuṁḍagānu kaṁdanavōlu sīmalōni vulucala hanu
maṁtadēvuniki dīpārādhanaku Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ bhāra
dvāja gōtra Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyuḍaI
na maṁtramūrti gaṁgādhara voḍayala pinavīramarāju
kumāruḍu maṁtramūrti pinabasuvayagāru tama
vipravinōdulu dakṣaṇamūrti kēśavaya valabhaya varada
ya cāgalamaṟi parvataya Anaṁtaya vīru mōdalaIna
vipravinōdulaku puṇyaṁgānu ma hmalu ta
ma vipravinōdulaku Icē vartana hanumaṁta dēvu
niki daṁḍaṁ samapi ṁ ci dīpārādhana bhāradvā
ja gōtra Āpastaṁbha sūtra yaju
mūtti gaṁgādhara voḍayalu
basuvaya
Digital edition of SII 37.427 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
